testSummary: local-api vitest: 52 files, 241 tests passed (incl. new campaign-delete.integration.test.ts, 6 tests). DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/cdp
e2eSummary: campaign-delete spec: 2 passed standalone. First full-suite run revealed the delete spec was deleting the SHARED seeded 'Welcome journey' (CAMP_A), polluting cdp_e2e for downstream campaign specs. Fixed: the spec now creates its OWN throwaway draft campaigns and never touches seeded data; published-variant archives itself to leave the DB clean. Re-running full campaign suite.
notes: Never-published = active_version_id IS NULL. DELETE /campaigns/:id (manage_content, workspace-scoped from ctx, foreign/missing->404). 409 when active_version_id set. GET /campaigns exposes `published`. Lint: only the 7 known pre-existing react-hooks rule-not-found errors, no new. Version 0.43.0 -> 0.44.0. No migration.
